alkylation reagent: alkylated in dark by 20 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated in dark by 20 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: the mixture of standard glycoproteins were digested by trypsin
enrichment method: Glycopeptides were enriched using zwitterioic hydrophilic interaction liquid chromatography (ZIC-HILIC)
labeling: the spectra of intact glycopeptides were collected using the SCE-HCD-MS/MS method
